  'cipolla': 'onion',
  'buonanotte': 'good night',
  'cornetto al cioccolato': 'chocolate croissant',

  'limone': 'lemon',

  'pasta': 'pasta',
  'bar': 'coffee shop',
  'saluti': 'greetings',
  'mercato': 'market',
  'città': 'city',
  'ristorante': 'restaurant',
  'Yo sono ___': 'I am ___ (name/nationality)',
  'Yo sono di ___': 'I am from ___',
  'Che (cosa) significa ___?': 'What\'s the meaning of ___?',
  'Come se dice "___" in italiano?': 'How d you say "___" in Italian?',
  'Come si scri ve ___?': 'How do write ___?',

  'museo': 'museum',
  'carne': 'meat',
  'chiesa': 'church',
  'dolce': 'dessert',
  'arrivederci': 'goodbye (informal)',
  'teatro': 'theater',
  'latte macchiato': 'milk with a few drops of coffee',
  'contorno': 'side dish',
  'bicchiere': 'drinking glass',
  'cornetto con la crema': 'cream-filled croissant',
  'ciao': 'hello/goodbye (informal)',
  'arancia': 'orange',
  'birra': 'beer',
  'verdura': 'vegetable',
  'tavolo': 'table',
  'frutta': 'fruit',
  'cassa': 'cash register',
  'Quant\' e?': 'How much is it?',
  'uva': 'grape',
  'tè': 'tea'
};

// Create reverse mapping for English to Italian
export const reverseVocabDict = Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(vocabDict).map(([italian, english]) => [english, italian]));

// Get all vocabulary pairs
export const getAllVocabPairs = () => {
  return Object.entries(vocabDict).map(([italian, english]) => ({
    italian,
    english
  }));
};

// Shuffle array utility
export const shuffleArray = array => {
  const shuffled = [...array];
  for (let i = shuffled.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
    const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));
    [shuffled[i], shuffled[j]] = [shuffled[j], shuffled[i]];
  }
  return shuffled;
};

sourcesContent:
// Italian-English Vocabulary Dictionary
// Converted from vocab_dict.py

export const vocabDict = {
    'buongiorno': 'good morning',
    'zucchine': 'zucchini',
    'fontane': 'fountain',
    'insalata': 'salad',
    'Il conto, per favore!': 'The bill, please!',
    'piazza': 'square',
    'coltello': 'knife',
    'pera': 'pear',
    'vino bianco': 'white wine',
    'carciofo': 'artichoke',
    'pomodori': 'tomato',
    'vicolo': 'alley',
    'melanzane': 'eggplant',
    'pepe': 'pepper',
    'cameriere': 'waiter',
    'senta, scusi': 'listen, excuse me',
    'cipolla': 'onion',
    'buonanotte': 'good night',
    'cornetto al cioccolato': 'chocolate croissant',
    'torre': 'tower',
    'Scusi, dov\' e la fermata della metropolitan/del tram/del bus?': 'Excuse me, where is the subway/tram/bus stop?',
    'pane': 'bread',
    'patate': 'potato',
    'mura romane': 'roman walls/murals',
    'cinema': 'movie theater/cinema',
    'arrivederla': 'goodbye (formal)',
    'caffelatte': 'coffee with milk',
    'tramezzino': 'sandwich/club sandwich',
    'antipasto': 'appetizer',
    'Quanto pago?': 'How much do I pay?',
    'sale': 'salt',
    'vino rosso': 'red wine',
    'basilico': 'basil',
    'il menù': 'menu',
    'panino': 'sandwich/panini',
    'limone': 'lemon',
    'taxi': 'taxi',
    'pasta': 'pasta',
    'bar': 'coffee shop',
    'saluti': 'greetings',
    'mercato': 'market',
    'città': 'city',
    'ristorante': 'restaurant',
    'Yo sono ___': 'I am ___ (name/nationality)',
    'Yo sono di ___': 'I am from ___',
    'Che (cosa) significa ___?': 'What\'s the meaning of ___?',
    'Come se dice "___" in italiano?': 'How d you say "___" in Italian?',
    'Come si scri ve ___?': 'How do write ___?',
    'Può ripetere, per favore?': 'Can you repeat, please?',
    'Non lo so': 'I don\'t know',
    'caffè': 'coffee',
    'palazzo': 'palace',
    'Vorrei un cappuccino, per favore!': 'I would like a cappuccino please!',
    'mele': 'apple',
    'salve': 'hello (formal)',
    'museo': 'museum',
    'carne': 'meat',
    'chiesa': 'church',
    'dolce': 'dessert',
    'arrivederci': 'goodbye (informal)',
    'teatro': 'theater',
    'latte macchiato': 'milk with a few drops of coffee',
    'contorno': 'side dish',
    'bicchiere': 'drinking glass',
    'cornetto con la crema': 'cream-filled croissant',
    'ciao': 'hello/goodbye (informal)',
    'arancia': 'orange',
    'birra': 'beer',
    'verdura': 'vegetable',
    'tavolo': 'table',
    'frutta': 'fruit',
    'cassa': 'cash register',
    'Quant\' e?': 'How much is it?',
    'uva': 'grape',
    'tè': 'tea'
};

// Create reverse mapping for English to Italian
export const reverseVocabDict = Object.fromEntries(
    Object.entries(vocabDict).map(([italian, english]) => [english, italian])
);

// Get all vocabulary pairs
export const getAllVocabPairs = () => {
    return Object.entries(vocabDict).map(([italian, english]) => ({
        italian,
        english
    }));
};

// Shuffle array utility
export const shuffleArray = (array) => {
    const shuffled = [...array];
    for (let i = shuffled.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
        const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));
        [shuffled[i], shuffled[j]] = [shuffled[j], shuffled[i]];
    }
    return shuffled;
};
